top.title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
top.summary: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defence Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

top.title: Three more Iran football team members change minds over asylum
top.summary: Four of seven members of the women's football delegation who originally sought to stay in Australia have now chosen to return home.

top.title: 'Gruesome' war bets fuel calls for crackdown on prediction markets
top.summary: Predictions markets have hosted millions of dollars of bets related to the war in Iran.

top.title: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
top.summary: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.

top.title: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
top.summary: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

top.title: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
top.summary: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.

title.#text: Trump administration is allegedly collecting $10 billion on the TikTok deal
Meta is reportedly laying off up to 20 percent of its staff
Hulu, Disney Plus, and the Pixel Watch 4 are among this week’s best deals
